secretLikeFields: entries containing bearer, token, password, and apiKey markers

observedSecurityBoundaries.policyEvaluation: Observed before RegexTextSearchTool execution with request id, operation id, tool id, and descriptor id.
observedSecurityBoundaries.redactionBoundary: Trace-level request and result payload logs contained [REDACTED] markers for apiKey, token, password, and bearer authorization values.
observedSecurityBoundaries.auditEnvelopeEmission: InMemoryAuditSink captured one BridgeAuditEnvelope after terminal success.
observedSecurityBoundaries.correlationPreservation: RequestId and OperationId matched across policy evaluation, logs, audit envelope, and BridgeToolResult.

captureMethod: Temporary console harness outside the repository using AddBridgeToolServices, RecordingBridgeLogger, a trace-only RecordingAllowPolicy, InMemoryAuditSink, IBridgeToolExecutor, and RegexTextSearchTool.
validationScope: Compiled shared bridge tool execution boundary only. No MEF, directory-loaded plugins, OAuth/authentication, real secret storage, MCP transport, presenter, proposal, or Visual Studio host behavior was exercised.
